mapper.select: /* ====== cmn.masking.selectList =========*/ SELECT A.CNT ,DECODE(A.MSK_AUTH_YN, 'Y','Y','1','Y','N') MSK_AUTH_YN ,'' || B.MSK_ID MSK_ID ,'' || C.MSK_GRP_ID MSK_GRP_ID ,'' || C.MSK_LNTH MSK_LNTH ,'' || C.MSK_LOC MSK_LOC ,'' || C.MSK_STRT_LOC MSK_STRT_LOC FROM ( SELECT COUNT(1) CNT, MAX(MSK_AUTH_YN ) MSK_AUTH_YN FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = #{SESSION_USER_ID } ) A, CMN_MSK_DTL B, CMN_MSK_GRP C WHERE 1 =1 AND B.MSK_GRP_ID = C.MSK_GRP_ID

/* ====== cmn.masking.selectListByBaseVo =========*/ SELECT A.CNT ,DECODE(A.MSK_AUTH_YN, 'Y','Y','1','Y','N') MSK_AUTH_YN ,'' || B.MSK_ID MSK_ID ,'' || C.MSK_GRP_ID MSK_GRP_ID ,'' || C.MSK_LNTH MSK_LNTH ,'' || C.MSK_LOC MSK_LOC ,'' || C.MSK_STRT_LOC MSK_STRT_LOC FROM ( SELECT COUNT(1) CNT, MAX(MSK_AUTH_YN ) MSK_AUTH_YN FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = #{sessionUserId} ) A, CMN_MSK_DTL B, CMN_MSK_GRP C WHERE B.MSK_GRP_ID = C.MSK_GRP_ID

/* ====== cmn.masking.selectOnlyList =========*/ SELECT A.CNT ,DECODE(A.MSK_AUTH_YN, 'Y','N','1','N','N') MSK_AUTH_YN ,'' || B.MSK_ID MSK_ID ,'' || C.MSK_GRP_ID MSK_GRP_ID ,'' || C.MSK_LNTH MSK_LNTH ,'' || C.MSK_LOC MSK_LOC ,'' || C.MSK_STRT_LOC MSK_STRT_LOC FROM ( SELECT COUNT(1) CNT, MAX(MSK_AUTH_YN ) MSK_AUTH_YN FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = #{SESSION_USER_ID } ) A, CMN_MSK_DTL B, CMN_MSK_GRP C WHERE 1 =1 AND B.MSK_GRP_ID = C.MSK_GRP_ID

/* ====== cmn.masking.selectList =========*/ SELECT A.CNT ,DECODE(A.MSK_AUTH_YN, 'Y','Y','1','Y','N') mskAuthYn ,'' || B.MSK_ID mskId ,'' || C.MSK_GRP_ID mskGrpId ,'' || C.MSK_LNTH mskLnth ,'' || C.MSK_LOC mskLoc ,'' || C.MSK_STRT_LOC mskStrtLoc FROM ( SELECT COUNT(1) CNT, MAX(MSK_AUTH_YN ) MSK_AUTH_YN FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = #{SESSION_USER_ID } ) A, CMN_MSK_DTL B, CMN_MSK_GRP C WHERE 1 =1 AND B.MSK_GRP_ID = C.MSK_GRP_ID
